tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
;; 1. Get all merged PRs that close a Linear issue
(def merged-prs (filter :closes_linear (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"})))

;; 2. Get all Linear issues that are NOT done
(def non-done-issues (filter #(not= "done" (:state %)) (linear_issues)))

;; 3. Index non-done issues by id for fast lookup
(def non-done-ids (set (map :id non-done-issues)))

;; 4. Find merged PR…(+294)
